c.d: How intuitive and user-friendly the app interface is for creating and sending broadcast messages.
The maximum number of contacts to which a message can be broadcasted simultaneously.
Availability of features like custom fields and dynamic content to personalize messages for each recipient.
Percentage of messages successfully delivered to recipients.
Ability to schedule messages to be sent at a future date and time.
The pricing structure of the app, including monthly fees, per-message costs, and any additional charges.
Features for organizing and managing contacts, such as tagging, segmentation, and importing/exporting.
Availability of tools to track message delivery, open rates, click-through rates, and other relevant metrics.
Ability to integrate with other platforms and services such as CRM, marketing automation, and e-commerce platforms.
Capability for recipients to reply to broadcast messages and engage in a conversation.
